name_cn:

New Caro Puffy Bag from the flagship store. Classic quilted pattern💌, high-quality gunmetal hardware, elegant yet chic. Premium calfskin with a great feel🐮, exquisite and unique chain strap. Multiple carrying styles, good capacity, versatile and chic. Get the Caro that fits your style 👏🏻
